description: Hallucinated URL (mastodon.turk) resolved to an error page. The agent must re-evaluate, not retry.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://mstdn.social/@example/12345 — Title: Example post — Mastodon]

can you also post this to MastoTurk in Turkish?

[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://mastodon.turk/ — Title: Server not found]

is it loaded?

args.question: I navigated to mastodon.turk but the page title is "Server not found" — that doesn't look like a real Mastodon instance. Is the URL actually mastoturk.org, or something else?

antiPatterns.reason: Retrying the exact same broken URL — the failure mode observed in gpt-4o trace 9ckqpf.
Same URL via a different tool — still a retry.

expected.successRubric: Must recognize "Server not found" title means the URL is dead. Acceptable: clarify with user, search for real URL, OR try ONE plausible variant like mastoturk.org. Anti-pattern: any retry of mastodon.turk through any tool.
